title.zh: 分布式系统中的一致性挑战及其解决路径

summary.en: A concise discussion of consistency challenges, failure modes, and the decision paths commonly used to address them in distributed systems.
summary.zh: 从 FLP、CAP、PACELC 到 Paxos、Raft、Zab、PBFT，再到 Spanner、etcd 与 KRaft，系统梳理一致性问题的理论边界与工程落地。

readingDirection.en: Read this when comparing consistency strategies or selecting a reliability model for cross-service workflows.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在补分布式系统理论基础，或想把共识协议和工业系统实现串起来时阅读。
